CustomField.description: TCV Value will be populated for MIPs created in FY25H1 && ACV Value will be populated for MIPs created after FY25H2
CustomField.inlineHelpText: TCV Value will be populated for MIPs created in FY25H1 and ACV Value will be populated for MIPs created after FY25H2
CustomField.label: Contract Period Bookings (ACV)
